creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text: You would need to add the same options or knobs to every libebur128 consumer, which introduces much more than just a maintenance burden, and certainly beyond just kde@ or any singular team or maintainer. At some point a line has to be drawn when it comes to functionally equivalent ports, with one oxidised and the other not, having option knobs or .mk or whatnot, because too many just becomes junk over time.
